channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Stories
channel.description: Packed Instagram-Story autolist — business, property, jobs and internships in one feed. Each item ships with a 1080×1920 story card and a 'Read more on Mutapa Times' CTA.

item.title: Highlanders Reveal Financial Struggles Despite Generating Over US$833,000
item.description: Highlanders’ latest financial report reveals how US$833,000 in revenue failed to prevent insolvency, exposing the club’s financial reality. The post Highlanders Reveal Financial Struggles Despite Generating Over US$833,000 appeared first on iHarare News. #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: GettyImages-2263686210
item.description: Sikandar Raza leads the Zimbabwe T20I side as they gear up for a three-match series against India starting July 23. Among the key changes from their last series against Bangladesh, wicket-keeper-batter Tafadzwa Tsiga has earned his maiden T20I call-up. All-rounder Wessly Madhever via Icc #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Icc

item.title: Zimbabwe make 3 changes for India T20I series @3menonaboat
item.description:
Curran, Tsiga and Nyamhuri set for possible debuts

The post Zimbabwe make 3 changes for India T20I series first appeared on Three Men On a Boat.

via Three Men On Boat #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Three Men On Boat

item.title: New Details Emerge in Holy Ten Alleged Rape Case
item.description: New Details Emerge in Holy Ten Alleged Rape Case New information has emerged regarding the circumstances that led to the alleged rape of a 14-year-old girl by musician Mukudzei Chitsama, popularly known as Holy Ten. According to sources, the teenager met the hip-hop star through via Iharare News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Victoria Falls Rainforest Reopens After Elephants Force Temporary Closure
item.description: Tourists can visit Victoria Falls Rainforest again after wildlife officials reopened the attraction following a temporary elephant-related safety closure today. The post Victoria Falls Rainforest Reopens After Elephants Force Temporary Closure appeared first on iHarare News. #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Victoria Falls anthem Kasambabezi captures audiences
item.description: Mthabisi Tshuma, THE collaborative track Kasambabezi, a musical tribute to Victoria Falls, is receiving positive reviews across digital platforms while creating new opportunities for the local artistes behind the project. item.title: Lithium, PGMs power Zimbabwe’s record US$$2,5bn export earnings @zimsituation
item.description: Source: Lithium, PGMs power Zimbabwe’s record US$$2,5bn export earnings – herald Business Reporter Zimbabwe recorded an 84 percent surge in mineral export revenues during the first half of 2026, generating a record US$2,532 billion from US$1,376 billion in the same period last ye via Zimbabwe Situation #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews

item.title: Knox Mtizwa targeted by Highlanders, TelOne after returning from South Africa @TelOneZW
item.description: Striker Knox Mtizwa has emerged as a transfer target for both Highlanders and TelOne in the ongoing mid-season window. Sources close to the developments say the forward, who recently returned to Zimbabwe after spending almost a decade playing in South Africa, is keen on securing via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Zimbabwe’s Brighton Chimene appointed VAR official for WAFCON
item.description: Zimbabwean referee Brighton Chimene has earned another continental assignment after being appointed as a Video Assistant Referee (VAR) for the upcoming Women’s Africa Cup of Nations (WAFCON) in Morocco. Chimene, the reigning Zimbabwe Referee of the Year, also served as a VAR offi via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Tech #AfricaTech #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Air Zimbabwe isn’t flying to London—they’re just selling tickets on a Spanish charter @nehandaradio
item.description: Direct Harare-London flights are back, but the aircraft, crew and operations belong to Spain’s Plus Ultra, raising questions about claims that Air Zimbabwe has resumed flying to the UK. The post Air Zimbabwe isn’t flying to London—they’re just selling tickets on a Spanish charter via Nehanda Radio #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Nehanda Radio
